Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseMultiplier_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the base multiplier for telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data accuracy for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryRandomOffsetRangeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the retry timing for telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data accuracy and reliability for game analytics.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a retry time for telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data tracking for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxBackoffTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum wait time for telemetry data to be sent if there are issues.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data reporting, which helps improve game performance for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxConcurrentRetriedRequests_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of concurrent retried telemetry requests.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes data collection processes, leading to improved game performance and stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxElapsedTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum time limit for tracking game performance data.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers monitor game performance more effectively.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxRetryAttempts_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of retry attempts for telemetry data transmission.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable data collection without overwhelming the system.

Added_Other.name: FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpRetries3_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the system to retry HTTP requests up to three times if they fail.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances reliability of data transmission, reducing errors for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnConnectFail_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries telemetry data transmission if the initial connection fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable data collection for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnDnsResolve_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries DNS resolution for telemetry data if it fails initially.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable tracking of player activity and system performance.
